final:
// // This register loads data on every negative edge of the input clock signal when the load signal is low.
module parallel_load_register(
    input       clk,
    input       rst,
    input       load,
    input  [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 8'b00000000;
        end
        else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This register loads data on every negative edge of the input clock signal when the load signal is low.
